differences.prototype: Right-side modal panel over dimmed homepage
differences.notes: Primary container pattern is different, so overall composition does not match.

differences.production: Larger vertical gaps, looser section rhythm, mixed card paddings
differences.prototype: Tighter, more uniform spacing with consistent internal padding
differences.notes: Section density and breathing room feel substantially different.

differences.production: Heavier headings and larger numerics; mixed text emphasis feels stronger
differences.prototype: More compact type scale and more controlled weight contrast
differences.notes: Typographic hierarchy style differs even when content roles are similar.

differences.production: High-saturation cyan/yellow/purple accents on deep navy
differences.prototype: Muted blue/teal glass palette with restrained green/red accents
differences.notes: Color temperature and saturation are not aligned.

differences.prototype: More consistent medium radius across panel/cards/rows
differences.notes: Corner language is similar in spirit but not token-consistent.

differences.production: Mostly flat cards with light glow accents
differences.prototype: Stronger depth: layered shadows, inner glow, glass blur treatment
differences.notes: Depth model and surface treatment differ significantly.

differences.production: Hero/player images vary more by section; some icons feel small vs card size
differences.prototype: More standardized image proportions and visual balance per row/card
differences.notes: Media scale system is less consistent in production.

differences.production: Linear scroll with equal visual weight across many modules
differences.prototype: Clear top-down hierarchy with grouped cards and strong bottom CTA
differences.notes: Attention flow and priority cues are materially different.

top_3_fixes: Align the core container paradigm first (modal panel + backdrop vs full-page screen); this will fix most hierarchy and spacing mismatches.
Adopt a shared design token set for typography, color, radius, and elevation (especially muted palette + glass/shadow model).
Standardize component sizing rules for logos, avatars, and hero thumbnails using fixed size tokens and consistent padding/crop ratios.
